title: senecio americanus
intro: Senecio americanus, also known as American Groundsel, is a flowering plant species native to North America, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and slender stems. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the plant can provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and promoting digestive health. Senecio americanus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular remedy in natural medicine.
